    Tune Charlie
    ✦ Managed by the claims handler — no IT needed
  

  

    
    

      
Instructions in plain language

      
Write how Charlie should work, yourself. The rule goes straight into Charlie's prompt.

      

        
File rules

        
Reply rules

      

      

        
✓Always write the city in CAPITALS.active

        
✓Amounts without currency symbol, with a dot as thousands separator.active

      

      

        
✓Close every reply with "Team CED Claims".active

        
✓Refer to "your broker or insurer", not just the insurer.active

      

      

        
        
        

          Charlie's prompt — 4 rules active
          
        

      

    

    
    

      
Test on examples

      
A new way of testing: try the rule instantly on real example assignments — without developers.

      

        

          
Baloise — Fire damage Lindelaan
Subject: “… SIN-2026-77421 …”

          •
        

        

          
AG Insurance — Water damage Ghent
Subject: “… SIN-2026-80512 …”

          •
        

        

          
KBC — Storm damage Bruges
Subject: “… SIN-2026-81120 …”

          •
        

        

          
Ethias — Fire damage Liège
Subject: “… SIN-2026-82001 …”

          •
        

      

      
      
✓ 4/4 examples correct — the rule works. Ready to use.

    

  







  

    
A new way of working

    

      

        
The classic way

        

          
Operations request

          
↓

          
Write a PRD

          
↓

          
Hand off to developers

          
↓

          
Testing

          
↺ back to dev → back to testing

          
Re-develop & re-test…

        

        
⏳ weeks · many hand-offs · IT-dependent

      

      
vs

      

        
With Charlie

        

          
📝 Write the rule (PRD)

          
🧪 Test on examples

          
🎚️ Fine-tune

          
🚀 Live in the product

          
all in one tool — by the handler

        

        
⚡ minutes · no hand-offs · no IT
